flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Carson-Newman University fell 13% between 2021 and 2024 (1.6k → 1.4k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Carson-Newman University rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($31.3k → $34.7k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Carson-Newman University rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($31.3k → $34.7k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 8 pp at Carson-Newman University vs the 2018–2022 baseline (46.5% vs 54.4%).
